---
title: "Proportions"
output: html_document
date: "2023-08-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(treemapify)
```

```{r}
sample_cluster_counts <- table(harmonized.seurat$seurat_clusters, harmonized.seurat$id)
sample_cluster_percent <- prop.table(sample_cluster_counts, margin = 1)
```

```{r}
sample_cluster_df <- as.data.frame(sample_cluster_percent) %>% 
  rename(Cluster = Var1, ID = Var2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(sample_cluster_df, aes(x = Cluster, y = Freq, fill = ID)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Percentage of Cells from Each Sample in Each Cluster",
       x = "Cluster",
       y = "Percent") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 

ggsave("./revisedDataset/proportions/Percent-cell-in-cluster-bySeuratCluster.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
treemap_counts <- table(harmonized.seurat$status, harmonized.seurat$cluster_named) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Status = Var1, Cluster = Var2) 

treemap_flc <- treemap_counts %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Status == "FLC") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Proportion = Freq/sum(Freq)*100) %>% 
  dplyr::slice(c(-5,-11))

treemap_nml <- treemap_counts %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Status == "NML") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Proportion = Freq/sum(Freq)*100) %>% 
  dplyr::slice(c(-5,-11))
```

```{r}
treemap_flc_plot <- ggplot(treemap_flc, aes(area = Freq, fill = Cluster,
                                label = paste0(Cluster, "\nCount: ", Freq, "\nProportion: ", round(Proportion,1)))) +
  geom_treemap() +
  geom_treemap_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, color = "black", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Treemap of Relative Cell Proportions within FLC",
       fill = "Tissue Status",
       caption = "Source: Khasayer Lab") +
  theme_minimal()

treemap_flc_plot + ggsave("revisedDataset/proportions/flc_treemap-removedClusters4_11.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
treemap_nml_plot <- ggplot(treemap_nml, aes(area = Freq, fill = Cluster,
                                label = paste0(Cluster, "\nCount: ", Freq, "\nProportion: ", round(Proportion,1)))) +
  geom_treemap() +
  geom_treemap_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, color = "black", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Treemap of Relative Cell Proportions within NML",
       fill = "Tissue Status",
       caption = "Source: Khasayer Lab") +
  theme_minimal()

treemap_nml_plot + ggsave("revisedDataset/proportions/nml_treemap-removedClusters4_11.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```
